case_title: TALMAGE, O.A. vs. SAN FRANCISCO MUSLIM COMMUNITY CEBTER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUSLIM COMMUNITY CENTER, DBA THE GREAT NEWS BOOK STORE
